creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
(In reply to Jonathan Price from comment #0)

> Portlint -A and poudriere testport outputs are available upon request.

Thanks for the patch. It would suffice just to confirm what tests were done and that they passed. Eg:

* Poudriere 11.0 amd64 - OK
* Poudriere 10.3 amd64 - OK
...
